header.title: Services
heading: Travel & Hospitality Services by Ceylon JOJO Travels
intro: We provide comfortable travel experiences, guided tours and authentic Sri Lankan hospitality.
items.private.title: Private Sri Lanka Tours
items.private.desc: Explore Sri Lanka with customized private tours including cultural sites, beaches, wildlife safaris and scenic hill country.
items.chauffeur.title: Chauffeur Guide Service
items.chauffeur.desc: Travel safely with experienced local chauffeur guides and modern air-conditioned vehicles for a comfortable journey across Sri Lanka.
items.packages.title: Tailor-Made Tour Packages
items.packages.desc: Choose from day tours, multi-day round tours and customized travel itineraries designed for your budget and interests.
items.airport.title: Airport Transfers
items.airport.desc: Reliable airport pickup and drop-off services from Bandaranaike International Airport to any destination in Sri Lanka.
items.safari.title: Wildlife Safari Tours
items.safari.desc: Experience unforgettable safari adventures in Yala and Udawalawe National Parks to see elephants, leopards and exotic wildlife.
